items.optionA: Fight 100 duck-sized horses
items.optionB: Fight 1 horse-sized duck
items.analysisA: You think quantity is easier than quality. You're wrong. You're just going to get nibbled to death.
items.analysisB: You prefer a boss battle. Main character energy, but you're underestimating the beak.

items.optionA: Have pause buttons for your life
items.optionB: Have rewind buttons for your life
items.analysisA: You're overwhelmed. You just need a break. Procrastinator energy.
items.analysisB: You live in the past. You regret things easily and want a do-over. Perfectionist.

items.optionA: Be invisible for a day
items.optionB: Fly for a day
items.analysisA: You're nosy. You want to snoop. Trust issues detected.
items.analysisB: You crave freedom. You feel trapped and just want to escape it all.

items.optionA: Talk to animals
items.optionB: Speak every human language
items.analysisA: You prefer pets to people. Socially awkward but pure heart.
items.analysisB: You want to connect with humans. Or just eavesdrop on tourists.

items.optionA: Be a reverse centaur (human legs, horse top)
items.optionB: Be a standard centaur (horse legs, human top)
items.analysisA: You're a monster. Why would you choose this? Pure chaos.
items.analysisB: You want the speed but keep the brain. Logical choice.

items.optionA: Sneeze every time you hide
items.optionB: Laugh every time you lie
items.analysisA: You're terrible at stealth games.
items.analysisB: You're a terrible liar. But at least you're jolly.

items.optionA: See 10 minutes into the future
items.optionB: See 100 years into the future
items.analysisA: You're anxious. You want to control the immediate outcome.
items.analysisB: You're curious about the big picture. Or you just want to know if we survive.

items.optionA: Wear a clown wig every day
items.optionB: Wear clown shoes every day
items.analysisA: You want people to look at your face. Attention seeker.
items.analysisB: You hope people don't look down. Shuffler.

items.optionA: Have a tail (prehensile)
items.optionB: Have functional gills
items.analysisA: Innovator. You fantasise about hands-free everything. Mostly groceries.
items.analysisB: Mermaid energy. You hate sweating and rent.

items.optionA: Have a pet dragon the size of a cat
items.optionB: Have a pet cat the size of a dragon
items.analysisA: Closet fantasy enthusiast. Dangerous, but make it cute.
items.analysisB: You think bigger is always better. Your house smells of catnip and fear.

items.optionA: Snap your fingers and a random object appears 1 foot away
items.optionB: Clap your hands and a random object disappears 1 foot away
items.analysisA: Maximalist. Accidental hoarder in 6 months.
items.analysisB: Petty minimalist. The neighbour's gnome is going first.

items.optionA: Be followed everywhere by a personal spotlight
items.optionB: Be followed everywhere by a personal theme song (only you hear it)
items.analysisA: Narcissist in training. You think everything is your cue.
items.analysisB: Inner monologue is a Hans Zimmer score. Delusional but iconic.

items.optionA: Have your thoughts appear as speech bubbles above your head
items.optionB: Have everything you say come out auto-tuned and robotic
items.analysisA: Your inner monologue is so dull you think people need subtitles.
items.analysisB: You think a robot voice fixes a personality. It does not.

items.optionA: Speak only in interpretive dance
items.optionB: Speak only by singing every word like opera
items.analysisA: Performance artist waiting for your moment. Life is a confused ballet.
items.analysisB: Every room is a stage. The grocery store dreads you.

items.optionA: Sneeze and have glitter explode from your nose
items.optionB: Burp and have a tiny puff of smoke come out
items.analysisA: Perpetually fabulous and messy. Carpet is destroyed.
items.analysisB: Subtle dramatic flair. Your farts probably have mood lighting too.

items.optionA: Open every door to a dramatic gust of wind
items.optionB: Answer every phone call to a mysterious fog filling the room
items.analysisA: You make an entrance to the bathroom. Main character syndrome.
items.analysisB: You add fog to ordering pizza. Get a hobby.

items.optionA: Have a permanent tiny rain cloud over your head
items.optionB: Have a permanent tiny sunbeam follow you (even indoors)
items.analysisA: Goth aesthetic locked in. Your hair is always damp.
items.analysisB: Sunburn at the cinema. But great for selfies.

items.optionA: Have hands that are always slightly sticky
items.optionB: Have feet that are always slightly damp
items.analysisA: Trapped in your own life metaphor. Handshakes are over.
items.analysisB: Sock industry hates you. Yoga class banishes you.

items.optionA: Be able to perfectly mimic any sound you hear
items.optionB: Be able to perfectly draw anything you see
items.analysisA: You chose 'human parrot.' Your talent is literally copying.
items.analysisB: You chose 'human camera.' Originality wasn't on the menu.

items.optionA: Always know if someone is lying — but never know the truth
items.optionB: Always know the truth — but never know if someone is lying
items.analysisA: You just want to feel superior by catching people. Trust issues much?
items.analysisB: Ignorance is bliss. You'll believe anything as long as it's 'true'.

items.optionA: Teleport, but only to places you've already been
items.optionB: Fly, but only at jogging speed
items.analysisA: Efficient mediocrity. Comfort zone got a fast pass.
items.analysisB: Too lazy to walk, too uninspired to soar. So you jog. In the air.

items.optionA: Talk to plants — but they're sarcastic
items.optionB: Talk to animals — but they only complain
items.analysisA: You crave verbal sparring. Your houseplants already glare.
items.analysisB: You're an emotional support human for the animal kingdom.

items.optionA: Have a dramatic wind machine activate whenever you walk
items.optionB: Have slow-motion replays trigger every time you do something cool
items.analysisA: Beyoncé energy. Every hallway is a runway.
items.analysisB: You highlight-reel yourself eating cereal. Iconic.

items.optionA: Have a constant low-volume kazoo soundtrack to your life
items.optionB: Have your inner monologue narrated by Morgan Freeman (out loud)
items.analysisA: Comedy at the cost of dignity. You'll lose every job interview.
items.analysisB: Every grocery list becomes profound. Worth the lawsuit.

items.optionA: Sneeze and confetti shoots out
items.optionB: Cough and a tiny rainbow appears
items.analysisA: Allergy season is now a parade. Very exhausting branding.
items.analysisB: Bronchitis pride. You're a Pixar short film.

items.optionA: Have a random celebrity cameo in every selfie you take
items.optionB: Have every group photo accidentally exclude you
items.analysisA: Clout farming on hard mode. Your camera roll is chaos.
items.analysisB: Ghost in your own life. Great for plausible deniability.

items.optionA: Have one finger that's twice as long as the others
items.optionB: Have one ear that's twice as big as the other
items.analysisA: Typing is destroyed. Pointing is unmatched.
items.analysisB: You hear secrets stereo. Sunglasses sit weird forever.

items.optionA: Burp every time you say 'thank you'
items.optionB: Hiccup every time you say 'sorry'
items.analysisA: Customer service jobs over. Weddings ruined.
items.analysisB: Apologetic by nature, hiccupping forever. British people would die.

items.optionA: Always have an audience laugh-track on your good jokes
items.optionB: Always have crickets play on your bad jokes
items.analysisA: Sitcom protagonist energy. You'll start writing for the laugh.
items.analysisB: Brutal feedback loop. Stand-up career instantly viable.

items.optionA: Be cursed to always finish other people's sentences (incorrectly)
items.optionB: Be cursed to always misremember the punchline of every joke
items.analysisA: Conversational chaos agent. Friends warn strangers about you.
items.analysisB: Dad-joke ruiner. Everyone winces but loves you anyway.

items.optionA: Have a tiny invisible orchestra play whenever you cook
items.optionB: Have a tiny invisible choir sing whenever you shower
items.analysisA: Every omelette is a Michelin moment. Pasta is now opera.
items.analysisB: Concerts in the bathroom. Roommates moving out tomorrow.

items.optionA: Be unable to say the letter 'S'
items.optionB: Be unable to say the letter 'T'
items.analysisA: 'Yeth pleathe' for the rest of your life. Snake names ruined.
items.analysisB: 'Hank you' to everyone. 'Toas' for breakfast. Devastating.

items.optionA: Lose all your money and valuables
items.optionB: Lose all the photos you've ever taken
items.analysisA: Sentimental. You value memories over wealth. Or you're broke anyway.
items.analysisB: Materialist. You'd rather buy new memories than keep the old ones.

items.optionA: Be famous when you're alive and forgotten when you die
items.optionB: Go down in history when you die but be unknown while alive
items.analysisA: You thrive on validation. Instant gratification junkie.
items.analysisB: You're an artist. You care about legacy more than comfort. Or you're a martyr.

items.optionA: Be an unknown superhero
items.optionB: Be a famous villain
items.analysisA: Altruistic. You do good for good's sake.
items.analysisB: You want the credit. You'd burn the world to be known.

items.optionA: Find true love
items.optionB: Find a suitcase with 5 million dollars
items.analysisA: Hopeless romantic. Unrealistically optimistic.
items.analysisB: Realist. You can buy a lot of dates with five mil.

items.optionA: Remember everything but never forget anything painful or embarrassing
items.optionB: Only remember pleasant memories but constantly forget important details
items.analysisA: Walking encyclopedia of regrets. You hold grudges and excel at trivia.
items.analysisB: Blissful optimist or conveniently forgetful. Highlight-reel personality.

items.optionA: Know the exact day you'll die
items.optionB: Know exactly how you'll die
items.analysisA: You want to plan the bucket list. Type-A even about death.
items.analysisB: You want to dodge it. You'll never sleep again.

items.optionA: Have everyone you love forget who you are
items.optionB: Forget everyone you love
items.analysisA: Brutal. You'd rather suffer than make them suffer.
items.analysisB: You chose your own peace. Unsettlingly self-protective.

items.optionA: Be perfectly happy but average at everything
items.optionB: Be exceptional at one thing but never satisfied
items.analysisA: You picked peace. Boring people live longer.
items.analysisB: Tortured-genius cosplay. You need the chase.

items.optionA: Always feel slightly anxious
items.optionB: Always feel slightly numb
items.analysisA: At least you're alive. Existing in fight-or-flight is a vibe.
items.analysisB: Functional but hollow. You'll text 'I'm fine' forever.

items.optionA: Know what everyone really thinks of you
items.optionB: Never know what anyone really thinks of you
items.analysisA: Brave. Or about to spiral. You can't unhear it.
items.analysisB: You picked the lie. Comfortable, blissful, unexamined.

items.optionA: Have your biggest secret revealed to everyone you know
items.optionB: Have a random secret about you (you choose) revealed worldwide
items.analysisA: You'd rather burn locally than globally. Strategic.
items.analysisB: You'd trade familiarity for anonymity. Strangers don't matter to you.

items.optionA: Live a long life full of regret
items.optionB: Live a short life with no regrets
items.analysisA: You're betting on time to fix things. Bold assumption.
items.analysisB: You'd burn out clean. Romantic but reckless.

items.optionA: Be deeply loved by 3 people
items.optionB: Be casually liked by 3000 people
items.analysisA: Quality over quantity. Therapist-approved.
items.analysisB: You confused popularity with peace. Lonely in a crowd.

items.optionA: Always be 5 minutes late to everything
items.optionB: Always know you'll fail right before you try
items.analysisA: Annoying but liveable. Your friends already know.
items.analysisB: You picked despair on a calendar. That's bleak.

items.optionA: Have to live every day like it's your last
items.optionB: Have to plan 10 years ahead at all times
items.analysisA: Exhausting hedonism. You'll be broke and emotional.
items.analysisB: Spreadsheet for a soul. You forgot to live.

items.optionA: Lose the ability to lie
items.optionB: Lose the ability to keep a secret
items.analysisA: Brutal honesty. Friendships will not survive.
items.analysisB: Walking gossip. People will stop telling you anything.

items.optionA: Know the moment your parents will die
items.optionB: Know the moment your best friend will betray you
items.analysisA: Painful but useful. You can say goodbye.
items.analysisB: You'd rather pre-grieve a person who's still hugging you.

items.optionA: Have your biggest dream come true exactly once
items.optionB: Have a small, content life — guaranteed
items.analysisA: You'd trade decades for one perfect moment. Romantic.
items.analysisB: You picked the soft life. Wise, slightly dim.

items.optionA: Be respected but never loved
items.optionB: Be loved but never respected
items.analysisA: Boardroom over bedroom. Lonely at the top.
items.analysisB: Hugged but never heard. Exhausting.

items.optionA: Forget your happiest memory
items.optionB: Forget your worst memory
items.analysisA: You'd lose joy to keep the lesson. Therapist energy.
items.analysisB: You'd erase the wound. Self-protective. Maybe cowardly.

items.optionA: Be feared but never crossed
items.optionB: Be liked but constantly underestimated
items.analysisA: Power move. Lonely move.
items.analysisB: Underdog forever. Quietly satisfying revenge potential.

items.optionA: Have one true soulmate but you'll never meet them
items.optionB: Have many shallow loves your whole life
items.analysisA: Beautifully tragic. You'll romanticise it forever.
items.analysisB: Realistic. Slightly cynical. Many great stories.

items.optionA: Be honest in every conversation, no filter
items.optionB: Be tactful in every conversation, even when it's a lie
items.analysisA: Truth-bomb personality. Free, friendless.
items.analysisB: Diplomat. Smooth, sometimes hollow.

items.optionA: Be the smartest person you know
items.optionB: Be the kindest person you know
items.analysisA: Ego choice. You want the trophy, not the warmth.
items.analysisB: Soft power. You'll be remembered longer.

items.optionA: Live in a world without lies
items.optionB: Live in a world without surprises
items.analysisA: You'd love it for a week. Then crave a polite lie.
items.analysisB: Predictable. Safe. Slightly grim.

items.optionA: Always know what you should do — but never do it
items.optionB: Never know what to do — but always commit fully
items.analysisA: Awareness-as-prison. The classic overthinker.
items.analysisB: Blissful chaos agent. At least you move.

items.optionA: Have your worst trait erased forever
items.optionB: Have your best trait amplified to perfection
items.analysisA: You picked therapy. Healthy.
items.analysisB: You picked superpower. Risky — your worst trait is still there.

items.optionA: Always be the one who loves more in a relationship
items.optionB: Always be the one who's loved more in a relationship
items.analysisA: Romantic giver. Often heartbroken.
items.analysisB: Quietly powerful. Often guilty.

items.optionA: Live a life that looks great but feels empty
items.optionB: Live a life that feels great but looks like a mess
items.analysisA: Instagram won. You lost.
items.analysisB: You picked yourself. Inconvenient for others, freeing for you.

items.optionA: Be remembered for your worst moment
items.optionB: Be forgotten despite your best moment
items.analysisA: Infamy is a kind of immortality. Bleak.
items.analysisB: You'd rather vanish than be defined by a low. Dignified.

items.optionA: Always tell people exactly how much you love them
items.optionB: Always show people exactly how much you love them
items.analysisA: Verbal lover. Words are your gift — and your overshare.
items.analysisB: Acts of service. Quiet, exhausting, undervalued.

items.optionA: Be incapable of feeling jealousy
items.optionB: Be incapable of feeling regret
items.analysisA: Healthy. Annoying. Your friends won't believe you.
items.analysisB: Sociopath-adjacent. But peaceful.

items.optionA: Have unlimited free food
items.optionB: Have unlimited free travel
items.analysisA: Homebody. Comfort food is your love language.
items.analysisB: Explorer. Experiences over calories.

items.optionA: Live in a house that's always too hot
items.optionB: Live in a house that's always too cold
items.analysisA: You're a lizard. You like to bake.
items.analysisB: You can always put on more layers. Practical thinker.

items.optionA: Live in a beautiful, isolated cabin in the woods with no internet
items.optionB: Live in a bustling city penthouse with constant connectivity
items.analysisA: You call it 'peaceful' — we call it 'avoidant.' Go hug a tree.
items.analysisB: Addicted to noise. Your soul is as quiet as a Friday penthouse.

items.optionA: Travel anywhere instantly but only stay 1 hour
items.optionB: Travel anywhere for unlimited time but it takes a year to get there
items.analysisA: Superficial sightseer. Your Instagram is checkbox tourism.
items.analysisB: Journey-over-destination type. Or just terrifyingly patient.

items.optionA: Live in a mansion that's always messy and disorganised
items.optionB: Live in a tiny apartment that's always perfectly clean
items.analysisA: Maximalist with a chaotic soul. Clutter is 'character.'
items.analysisB: Minimalist with an obsessive streak. Sock drawer is immaculate.

items.optionA: Only eat food you cook yourself
items.optionB: Only eat food prepared by others
items.analysisA: Control freak in the kitchen. Potlucks are a biohazard to you.
items.analysisB: Lazy or trusting. Your favourite takeout menu is memorised.

items.optionA: Only eat extremely bland food forever
items.optionB: Only eat incredibly spicy food forever
items.analysisA: You chose a life as flavourless as your wardrobe.
items.analysisB: Chasing a chemical high because life lacks excitement.

items.optionA: Taste exotic flavours brilliantly but familiar food tastes like cardboard
items.optionB: Only taste familiar food but it's always perfect
items.analysisA: Adventurous epicurean. Bored by the mundane.
items.analysisB: Comfort eater. You have a favourite diner and you defend it.

items.optionA: Have a personal chef but only for instant ramen
items.optionB: Have a personal stylist but only for Crocs and fanny packs
items.analysisA: You outsource the simplest tasks. Monument to convenience.
items.analysisB: Peak irony. Just admit you have no style.

items.optionA: Travel only by train, forever
items.optionB: Travel only by plane, forever
items.analysisA: Slow romantic. You think every journey is a Wes Anderson film.
items.analysisB: Time-obsessed. You'd rather cramp than wait.

items.optionA: Live somewhere it's always 22°C and sunny
items.optionB: Live somewhere with all four dramatic seasons
items.analysisA: Boring climate, boring person. (Sorry, San Diego.)
items.analysisB: You want feelings with your weather. Maximalist.

items.optionA: Live above a bakery
items.optionB: Live above a coffee shop
items.analysisA: You'd weigh 200kg in a year. Worth it.
items.analysisB: Caffeine-fuelled, sleep-deprived, weirdly happy.

items.optionA: Have one dream restaurant for free, forever
items.optionB: Have any restaurant in the world, but pay full price
items.analysisA: Loyalist. The waiter is now family. Boring but cosy.
items.analysisB: Variety-driven. Broke but cultured.

items.optionA: Drink only water for the rest of your life
items.optionB: Drink anything except water for the rest of your life
items.analysisA: Health saint. Brunches are now sad.
items.analysisB: Kidney roulette. But the brunches go hard.

items.optionA: Have to eat the same breakfast every day for life
items.optionB: Never eat the same breakfast twice
items.analysisA: Routine over chaos. You probably already do this.
items.analysisB: Decision fatigue is your hobby. Exhausting.

items.optionA: Live in a city you've always dreamed of but know no one
items.optionB: Live in your hometown forever, surrounded by everyone you love
items.analysisA: Brave reset. Loneliness incoming.
items.analysisB: Cosy stagnation. You'll wonder 'what if' forever.

items.optionA: Stay in 5-star hotels but always solo
items.optionB: Stay in hostels but always with great company
items.analysisA: Luxurious loner. The minibar is your friend.
items.analysisB: Memory-rich, sleep-poor. The bunk bed builds character.

items.optionA: Eat your favourite meal every day and never get sick of it
items.optionB: Eat a different brand-new meal every day
items.analysisA: Loyalist comfort core. Your palate is locked in.
items.analysisB: Foodie chaos goblin. The kitchen is a science lab.

items.optionA: Have a kitchen that cooks for you (badly)
items.optionB: Have a kitchen you cook in yourself (well)
items.analysisA: Lazy. You'll eat mediocre forever and call it a win.
items.analysisB: Skilled but tired. Your back hurts.

items.optionA: Live a year in Paris
items.optionB: Live a year in Tokyo
items.analysisA: Romantic. Croissant-pilled. Slightly cliché.
items.analysisB: Hyper-modern. Convenience-store dinner enthusiast.

items.optionA: Have an apartment with an incredible view but tiny
items.optionB: Have a huge apartment with a brick wall view
items.analysisA: Aesthetic over function. Daily inspiration tax.
items.analysisB: Practical hermit. The brick is honestly fine.

items.optionA: Always be cold but live by the beach
items.optionB: Always be hot but live in the mountains
items.analysisA: Picturesque suffering. Worth it for the sunsets.
items.analysisB: Elevated misery. Hiking apologists.

items.optionA: Drink the world's best coffee, but only one cup a day
items.optionB: Drink unlimited mediocre coffee
items.analysisA: Quality snob. Ritual matters more than caffeine.
items.analysisB: Volume person. You don't drink coffee, you commute on it.

items.optionA: Eat sushi every day
items.optionB: Eat pizza every day
items.analysisA: Refined palate, expensive habit, smug emails.
items.analysisB: Joyful gremlin. No notes.

items.optionA: Travel the world solo for a year
items.optionB: Travel one country deeply for a year with friends
items.analysisA: Eat-Pray-Love arc. You'll come back insufferable.
items.analysisB: Memory factory. You'll have inside jokes for life.

items.optionA: Live somewhere with an amazing food scene but no nature
items.optionB: Live somewhere with incredible nature but bad food
items.analysisA: Mouth over lungs. Predictable city dweller.
items.analysisB: Lungs over mouth. You will get tired of granola.

items.optionA: Have to wake up at 5 AM every day
items.optionB: Have to stay up till 3 AM every night
items.analysisA: Smug morning evangelist. Insufferable on Mondays.
items.analysisB: Vampire shift. Productive at 2 AM, useless at 10.

items.optionA: Live in a houseboat
items.optionB: Live in a converted van
items.analysisA: Permanent gentle rocking. Your back is somehow fine.
items.analysisB: Van-life Instagram phase. Showering is the problem.

items.optionA: Have all your meals delivered, never cook
items.optionB: Have to cook every single meal from scratch
items.analysisA: Outsourced existence. Wallet hates you.
items.analysisB: Chef energy or martyr energy. Possibly both.

items.optionA: Have one perfect food memory you can taste any time
items.optionB: Have one perfect travel memory you can re-live any time
items.analysisA: Sensory loyalist. Grandma's curry on tap.
items.analysisB: Adventurer's nostalgia. The sunset replays forever.

items.optionA: Live in a place where it's always your favourite season
items.optionB: Live in a place where every day is a brand-new adventure
items.analysisA: Comfort-coded. Predictable bliss.
items.analysisB: Chaos-coded. Exhausted but smiling.

items.optionA: Eat dinner with your 10-year-old self
items.optionB: Eat dinner with your 80-year-old self
items.analysisA: Healing arc. Will end in tears.
items.analysisB: Spoilers arc. Will also end in tears.

items.optionA: Be Batman
items.optionB: Be Iron Man
items.analysisA: Brooding and edgy. You think trauma makes you interesting.
items.analysisB: Flashy and arrogant. You think money solves everything.

items.optionA: Give up social media forever
items.optionB: Give up movies and TV forever
items.analysisA: Addicted to the scroll. You need validation.
items.analysisB: You value connection over content. Or you really like memes.

items.optionA: Live without music
items.optionB: Live without TV
items.analysisA: You have no soul.
items.analysisB: You can make your own entertainment.

items.optionA: Live in the Marvel universe
items.optionB: Live in the Harry Potter universe
items.analysisA: Saviour complex. Constant city-destroying chaos.
items.analysisB: Boarding-school nostalgic. Ignoring the wizard fascism.

items.optionA: Lose all music made before 2010
items.optionB: Lose all music made after 2010
items.analysisA: Modernist. Goodbye Queen, hello brain rot.
items.analysisB: Boomer in training. Slightly justified.

items.optionA: Be the lead in a hit reality TV show
items.optionB: Be a writer behind your favourite scripted show
items.analysisA: Fame-thirsty. The contract will ruin your life.
items.analysisB: Dignified influence. No one will know your name.

items.optionA: Have a verified blue check on every platform but only 50 followers
items.optionB: Have 1 million followers but no verification, ever
items.analysisA: Vanity over reach. Cute.
items.analysisB: Reach over status. Smart and slightly chaotic.

items.optionA: Be in a Christopher Nolan film (you won't understand it)
items.optionB: Be in a Wes Anderson film (you have to wear that outfit forever)
items.analysisA: Confused but cinematic. Inception-core.
items.analysisB: Symmetrical for life. The hat is non-negotiable.

items.optionA: Have unlimited concert tickets but only solo seats
items.optionB: Have one VIP backstage pass per year but never buy tickets again
items.analysisA: Anti-social music nerd. Headphones are family.
items.analysisB: Big swing energy. One night a year carries you.

items.optionA: Be cast in the next Bond film
items.optionB: Be cast in the next Marvel film
items.analysisA: Old-school cool. Tuxedos and stunts.
items.analysisB: Franchise contract slavery. But the trailer drops slap.

items.optionA: Spend a day on the set of Friends
items.optionB: Spend a day on the set of Game of Thrones
items.analysisA: Comfort TV core. You'd flirt with Joey.
items.analysisB: Drama tourist. The CGI dragons are smaller than you think.

items.optionA: Be famous on TikTok forever
items.optionB: Be famous in print magazines forever
items.analysisA: Algorithm pet. Burnout in 18 months.
items.analysisB: Vintage prestige. Nobody under 30 knows you.

items.optionA: Watch only the same 5 movies for the rest of your life
items.optionB: Watch every new release but never re-watch anything
items.analysisA: Comfort over discovery. You'll quote them constantly.
items.analysisB: Critic mode. No emotional attachment, just throughput.

items.optionA: Have unlimited access to Netflix but no other platform
items.optionB: Have access to every platform but only 1 hour a day
items.analysisA: Algorithm captive. You'll watch the same crime doc twice.
items.analysisB: Curated viewer. Forced to actually choose.

items.optionA: Be a one-hit-wonder pop star
items.optionB: Be a respected indie artist no one buys
items.analysisA: Quick fame, long shame. Royalties are nice.
items.analysisB: Critical darling, eternal broke. Pitchfork loves you.

items.optionA: Live in any anime universe
items.optionB: Live in any video game universe
items.analysisA: Dramatic monologue energy. Hair is now extreme.
items.analysisB: Respawn enabled. Inventory management is hell.

items.optionA: Sing the next James Bond theme
items.optionB: Score the next Pixar film
items.analysisA: Solo glory. One iconic note.
items.analysisB: Quietly devastating. Children will sob to your music.

items.optionA: Win a Nobel Prize but no one knows what for
items.optionB: Win an Oscar but for a movie you didn't make
items.analysisA: Mystery genius. The plaque is enough.
items.analysisB: Fraud, but accepting the speech anyway.

items.optionA: Be best friends with your favourite musician
items.optionB: Be best friends with your favourite actor
items.analysisA: Backstage forever. Their schedule will ruin you.
items.analysisB: Premiere-pilled. They'll never text back.

items.optionA: Be famous for one viral mistake forever
items.optionB: Be invisible despite a brilliant career
items.analysisA: You picked infamy. Bold.
items.analysisB: Quiet legend. Slightly bitter, very respected.

items.optionA: Have your favourite show get one perfect final season
items.optionB: Have your favourite show go on for 20 more seasons (mid quality)
items.analysisA: Adult choice. Closure-pilled.
items.analysisB: You'd milk it dry. Late seasons are your whole personality.

items.optionA: Direct one Oscar-winning film
items.optionB: Star in ten forgettable hits
items.analysisA: Auteur. Cocktail-party god.
items.analysisB: Working actor. Comfortable, anonymous, employed.

items.optionA: Have a daily column in a major paper
items.optionB: Have a podcast 1 million people listen to
items.analysisA: Respected. Slow. Print is dying anyway.
items.analysisB: Loud, lucrative, exhausting. You'll have a cold-brew sponsor.

items.optionA: Be the breakout star of a sitcom
items.optionB: Be the villain in a prestige drama
items.analysisA: Catchphrase forever. Typecast forever.
items.analysisB: Emmy bait. Strangers will hate you in real life.

items.optionA: Trade lives with your favourite musician for a week
items.optionB: Trade lives with your favourite athlete for a week
items.analysisA: Hangover-core. The voice does not survive this.
items.analysisB: Pain-core. Your body is not built for it.

items.optionA: Have to listen only to the top 40 forever
items.optionB: Have to listen only to your dad's music forever
items.analysisA: Algorithm slop. You'll know every Drake feature.
items.analysisB: Classic rock prison. Actually maybe upgrade.

items.optionA: Have a movie made about your life starring a great actor (it's mid)
items.optionB: Have a documentary made about your life that's brilliant (no one watches)
items.analysisA: Vanity over truth. The trailer is decent.
items.analysisB: Truth over fame. You'll dine out on the Sundance moment.

items.optionA: Be in a band that breaks up after one perfect album
items.optionB: Be in a band that releases 12 mediocre albums
items.analysisA: Cult-classic energy. Reunion tour rumours forever.
items.analysisB: Touring lifers. Royalty-comfortable, soul-tired.

items.optionA: Be able to spoil any movie or show before watching it
items.optionB: Never have anything spoiled, ever, ever
items.analysisA: Chaos goblin. You ruin parties.
items.analysisB: Pure consumer bliss. The internet has been muted.

items.optionA: Have unlimited free books for life
items.optionB: Have unlimited free streaming for life
items.analysisA: Tea-and-cardigan core. Quietly superior.
items.analysisB: Couch-pilled. You'll finish nothing but watch everything.

items.optionA: Be the star of a Studio Ghibli film
items.optionB: Be the star of a Pixar film
items.analysisA: Soft, watercolour life. There's a forest spirit involved.
items.analysisB: Emotionally devastating in 90 minutes. Inevitable life lesson.

items.optionA: Have a character named after you in your favourite franchise
items.optionB: Be the actor who plays a tiny but iconic role in it
items.analysisA: Immortal nerd cred. Wikipedia entry locked in.
items.analysisB: Convention-circuit royalty. Forever 'that guy.'

items.optionA: Date someone wildly attractive but boring in conversation
items.optionB: Date someone average-looking but the best conversationalist you've ever met
items.analysisA: Honest. Shallow. The silence will break you in 3 weeks.
items.analysisB: Mature. Smug. You'll write a Medium post about it.

items.optionA: Have your search history made public for one day
items.optionB: Have your DMs made public for one day
items.analysisA: You'd rather be judged for curiosity than receipts.
items.analysisB: You're either innocent or about to be unemployed.

items.optionA: Have an amazing first kiss but a terrible relationship
items.optionB: Have an awkward first kiss but a perfect relationship
items.analysisA: Sucker for fireworks. You'll romanticise the wreckage.
items.analysisB: Long-game player. The kiss gets better, promise.

items.optionA: Be told every flaw your ex saw in you
items.optionB: Be told every reason your ex still thinks about you
items.analysisA: Masochist. Therapy on hard mode.
items.analysisB: Ego food. You'll spiral but smile.

items.optionA: Date someone who's secretly read your diary
items.optionB: Date someone whose diary you've secretly read
items.analysisA: You'd rather be exposed than be the snake.
items.analysisB: Snake. You picked snake. Self-aware queen.

items.optionA: Have one wild story about you go viral
items.optionB: Have all your text exchanges with your crush leaked
items.analysisA: Folk-hero ambitions. The story is now mythology.
items.analysisB: You'd rather die. We get it.

items.optionA: Always know if someone's flirting with you
items.optionB: Always know if you're flirting with someone (you can't tell now)
items.analysisA: You missed every signal in your 20s. This is overdue.
items.analysisB: Self-awareness chaos. You're flirty and didn't know.

items.optionA: Have a partner who's wildly jealous
items.optionB: Have a partner who's bizarrely uninterested
items.analysisA: You read jealousy as love. Red flag, possibly a parade.
items.analysisB: You'd rather be ignored than smothered. Avoidant much?

items.optionA: Sext only via emoji forever
items.optionB: Sext only in fully formatted essays forever
items.analysisA: Lazy and effective. 🍑🔥 carries you.
items.analysisB: MLA citations on the foreplay. Niche, weirdly hot.

items.optionA: Hook up with your celebrity crush once (no one ever knows)
items.optionB: Have everyone know about it but it never actually happened
items.analysisA: Private win. You'll smile to yourself for years.
items.analysisB: Clout over reality. The lie is the prize.

items.optionA: Date someone with the exact same flaws as you
items.optionB: Date someone with the exact opposite flaws as you
items.analysisA: Trauma-bond fast track. Therapy can't keep up.
items.analysisB: Friction-bond. Either growth or war.

items.optionA: Have an ex marry someone better than you
items.optionB: Have an ex marry someone obviously worse than you
items.analysisA: Mature. You're rooting for them. Sort of.
items.analysisB: Petty. Comforting. Smug for years.

items.optionA: Have a one-night stand you remember forever
items.optionB: Have a 5-year relationship you barely remember
items.analysisA: Quality intensity. Very romantic, slightly unhinged.
items.analysisB: Beige comfort. You forgot anniversaries on purpose.

items.optionA: Be told every flirty thought your partner has had about other people
items.optionB: Be told every flirty thought you've had revealed to your partner
items.analysisA: You can handle the truth. Allegedly.
items.analysisB: You'd rather burn yourself than them. Self-sacrificial chaos.

items.optionA: Have a partner who PDA's constantly in public
items.optionB: Have a partner who never touches you in public, ever
items.analysisA: Performative love. Friends are leaving the chat.
items.analysisB: Cold-coded. Nobody believes you're together.

items.optionA: Have your most embarrassing dating moment shown on national TV
items.optionB: Have your most embarrassing dating moment played at your wedding
items.analysisA: Strangers laughing is survivable. Just.
items.analysisB: At least it's an inside joke now. Right? Right??

items.optionA: Date someone 10 years older
items.optionB: Date someone 10 years younger
items.analysisA: Wisdom-pilled. Their friends will hate you.
items.analysisB: Energy-pilled. Their playlists will baffle you.

items.optionA: Always be the bigger flirt in the relationship
items.optionB: Always be the more reserved one
items.analysisA: Charm is your love language. And your weapon.
items.analysisB: Slow-burn. Quietly devastating once you commit.

items.optionA: Sleep with the lights on every night
items.optionB: Sleep in pitch black every night
items.analysisA: Scared of the dark. Or of yourself.
items.analysisB: Cave-dweller. Productivity post-nap is unmatched.

items.optionA: Have your partner read every text you've ever sent
items.optionB: Have your boss read every text you've ever sent
items.analysisA: Awkward, possibly survivable. Mostly.
items.analysisB: Career-ending event. Unemployment incoming.

items.optionA: Date your celebrity crush for 1 month, knowing it ends
items.optionB: Date a stranger for 50 years, perfect happiness guaranteed
items.analysisA: Live fast, regret late. Iconic.
items.analysisB: Boring. Wise. Probably correct.

items.optionA: Have to share your phone unlocked with your partner forever
items.optionB: Have to share your bank account fully visible with your partner forever
items.analysisA: You have nothing to hide. Allegedly.
items.analysisB: Money is the lesser secret. Telling.

items.optionA: Hook up with someone who's a great kisser but selfish
items.optionB: Hook up with someone who's a bad kisser but generous
items.analysisA: You picked the trailer over the movie. Bold.
items.analysisB: Wise long-game. The kiss can be coached.

items.optionA: Be told the exact day you meet your soulmate
items.optionB: Be told the exact day your last relationship ends
items.analysisA: Hopeful planner. The countdown will haunt you.
items.analysisB: Doom-pilled. You'd live in pre-grief forever.

items.optionA: Have one wild secret about you tattooed on your arm
items.optionB: Have one bland fact about you screamed at you every morning
items.analysisA: You wear your chaos. It's a vibe.
items.analysisB: Annoying but private. Wins long-term.

items.optionA: Find out your partner has hooked up with one of your friends (before you met)
items.optionB: Find out your partner has hooked up with one of your siblings (before you met)
items.analysisA: Awkward Christmas. Survivable.
items.analysisB: Family group chat is now a war zone.

items.optionA: Have an open book about every person you've ever kissed
items.optionB: Have an open book about every person who's ever rejected you
items.analysisA: Receipts. Mostly fine. A few will sting.
items.analysisB: The receipts are devastating in volume.

items.optionA: Be cursed to always tell the truth on a first date
items.optionB: Be cursed to always lie on a first date
items.analysisA: Speedrun the red flags. Efficient.
items.analysisB: Built on sand. Second date becomes cardio.

items.optionA: Have a partner who's loud in private
items.optionB: Have a partner who's loud in public
items.analysisA: Standard. Slightly smug. Walls are thin though.
items.analysisB: Restaurant horror. Friends stop inviting you.

items.optionA: Have your last text sent at 2 AM read by everyone you know
items.optionB: Have your last screenshot saved read by everyone you know
items.analysisA: Drunk feelings, public feelings. Career-adjacent risk.
items.analysisB: Receipts hoarder exposed. Friendships adjusting.

items.optionA: Marry the person you've loved most (it lasts 5 years)
items.optionB: Marry someone you grow to love deeply (it lasts 50 years)
items.analysisA: Romantic. Doomed. Worth it.
items.analysisB: Pragmatic. Lovely. Possibly the right answer.

items.optionA: Be irresistible to people you have zero interest in
items.optionB: Be invisible to people you're wildly attracted to
items.analysisA: Endless awkward declines. The ego is fed though.
items.analysisB: Romantic ghost. The crushes will outlive you.
